title: Support combinational UDP tables (#468 partial)
body:
Add the support of UDP table for non-sequential logic. The basic idea is realized in this way, for example:
```
    table  
        //b c ：a
           ?  1  :   1;
           1  0  :   1;
           1  1  :   1;
           0  0  :   0;
    endtable
```
For every table line,  two vectors will be built to realize this line, namely mask vector and cmp vector.
Mask vector(m_vec), cmp vector(c_vec) and input vector(i_vec) are together used to confirm whether the condition is satisfied.
The condition for very line is **if(m_vec & i_vec == c_vec)**. If the condition is satisfied, the output will be set as the corresponding
output value of this line.
For the example above, i_vec = {b, c}.
For table line1: m_vec = {0,1}, c_vec = {0, 1}.
For table line2: m_vec = {1,1}, c_vec = {1, 0}.
For table line3: m_vec = {1,1}, c_vec = {1, 1}.
For table line4: m_vec = {1,1}, c_vec = {0, 0}.
Currently, only the non-sequential logic is supported, but the sequential logic can also be realized in a similar way.  The support will be realized in another commit.
